name: Risotto with Porcini, Shiitake and Vin Santo
recipeIngredient: 4 cups chicken stock, heated to simmer in saucepan
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat all chicken stock to simmer and place on back burner at low temperature.
2. In a heavy bottom 12 to 14-inch sauté pan over medium flame, heat 4 tablespoons virgin olive oil. Add chopped onion and saute until translucent but not browned.
3. Add mushrooms and saute until lightly browned but not fully cooked. Add rice and stir over heat for one minute to coat thoroughly.
4. Add a 4-ounce ladle of warm chicken stock and, stirring constantly, allow it to cook, boiling slowly until it dissipates. When it is gone, add another ladle of broth and repeat until the rice is quite al dente (about 12 to 14 minutes).
5. Add butter, vin santo, and Parmigiano Reggiano. Bring to boil again, continuing to stir until the rice is done, firm, and tender all the way through.
6. Turn off heat.
Yield: 4 servings
